allow: Bash(node -e "const sharp=require\('sharp'\);\(async\(\)=>{for\(const f of ['public/favicon.svg','src/assets/logo.png','src/assets/founder.jpg']\){try{const m=await sharp\(f\).metadata\(\);console.log\(f, m.width+'x'+m.height, m.format\)}catch\(e\){console.log\(f,'ERR',e.message\)}}}\)\(\)")
Bash(rm -f public/logo.webp public/favicon.svg && echo "removed logo.webp + 616KB favicon.svg" && ls -la public)
